prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: You are on a commercial construction project governed by building codes, submittals, and third-party inspections. The work under review is Fire alarm devices & circuits, part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: smoke detector spacing/placement. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: NFPA 72.
title: Compliance check: Fire alarm devices & circuits (commercial project)
